lines: [00:00.220]Is everybody seated?  大家都坐好了吗？
[00:09.650]The wheels on the bus go .  巴士车的轮子
[00:13.300]Round and round.Round and round.Round and round.
[00:22.600]The wheels on the bus go.  巴士车的轮子。
[00:28.970]Round and round. But they suddenly stop.  转啊转，但突然停了。
[00:36.000]The people on the bus say.  巴士车的乘客问。
[00:45.590]The bus broke down.The bus broke down.  车坏了，车坏了。
[00:48.990]Everybody gets off .  乘客们下车了.
[00:52.200]One by one. One by one. One by one. 一个接一个,一个接一个,一个接一个
[01:00.170]The driver on the bus says.  巴士车的司机说。
[01:03.450]Be careful! Be careful please!   要小心，请小心！
[01:06.710]The monster truck driver says.  怪兽车的司机说。
[01:09.910]Here I am. Here I am. Here I am.  我来了。我来了。我来了。
[01:13.260]The driver on the bus says.   巴士车的司机说。
[01:16.630]Thank you. Thank you for coming.  谢谢你，谢谢你能来。
[01:23.570]The wheels on the truck go.  怪兽车的轮子。
[01:27.020]Round and round. Round and round. Round and round.
[01:33.280]The wheels on the truck go.   怪兽车的轮子。
[01:35.640]Round and round. On the road.  转啊转，在路上。
[01:36.650]The wheels on the bus go.   巴士车的轮子。
[01:39.130]Round again. Round again. Round again.  又转起来，又转起来，又转起来
[01:44.580]The wheels on the bus go.  巴士车的轮子 。
[01:45.420]Round again. On the road.  在路上，又转起来。"
